collections.name: users
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX `idx_users_codigo_unique` ON `users` (codigo) WHERE codigo != ''

collections.name: projects
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX `idx_projects_share_token` ON `projects` (share_token) WHERE share_token != ''

collections.name: financial_categories
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_financial_categories_name ON financial_categories (name)

collections.name: contract_templates
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_contract_templates_name ON contract_templates (name)

collections.name: distribution_calculations
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_dist_calc_date ON distribution_calculations (date DESC)

collections.name: contact_interactions
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_contact_interactions_date ON contact_interactions (interaction_date DESC)

collections.name: user_project_access
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_upa_user_project ON user_project_access (user, project)

collections.name: project_presence
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_project_presence_user_project ON project_presence (user, project)
CREATE INDEX idx_project_presence_project_active ON project_presence (project, last_active)

collections.name: project_category_config
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_project_category_config_unique ON project_category_config (project, parent_tag)
